name: Sports Car Challenge
author: Poki
description: Sports Car Challenge is a 3D driving game created by Blue Axis games. Jump into various sports cars and push their limits! Explore a beautiful large city and ride wherever you want in the vehicle of your choosing. You can also complete challenges or perform fantastic stunts to impress passersby. There are over 15 missions for you to complete, and several cars to choose from. So pick the car that suits you best and start driving. Don't forget to share the game with your friends! How to play: Drive - WASD keys Brake - Space bar Nitro - Shift About the creator: Sports Car Challenge was created by Blue Axis Games. Play their other car driving game on Poki: Flying Car Simulator
